zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Pelham於大約1429年出生在英國素可勞頓時，她的父親Sir John Pelham Knt.43歲，母親Joan Courcy32歲。她於大約1444年與John Bramshot結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Pelham于大约1429年出生在英国素可勞頓时，她的父亲Sir John Pelham Knt.43岁，母亲Joan Courcy32岁。她于大约1444年与John Bramshot结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Pelham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Sussex): habitational name from Brent Pelham, Furneux Pelham, and Stocking Pelham in Hertfordshire, so called from the Old English personal name Pēola + hām ‘homestead’. Compare Pellham .

History: The manor of Pelham in Hertfordshire, England, was held by Walter de Pelham in the reign of Edward I (1272–1307). His descendants became constables of Pevensey Castle, Sussex, and were so influential that their badge, the buckle, is seen in at least eleven of the county's churches, and as a decoration on iron chimney-backs in Sussex farmhouses. Various branches of the family were ennobled and their titles include earl of Chichester and earl of Yarborough. The family also once held the dukedom of Newcastle and the marquessate of Clare. Peter Pelham (born c. 1695), an engraver, emigrated to Boston, MA, after 1728, and was stepfather to the artist John Singleton Copley.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Pelham was born about 1429, in Laughton, Sussex, England, her father, Sir John Pelham Knt., was 43 and her mother, Joan Courcy, was 32. She married John Bramshot about 1444. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Pelham est née environ 1429, à Laughton, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Pelham Knt., avait 43 ans et sa mère, Joan Courcy, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé John Bramshot environ 1444. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Pelham um 1429 in Laughton, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Pelham Knt. 43 und ihre Mutter Joan Courcy 32. Sie hat um 1444 John Bramshot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Pelham è nata il circa 1429 nel Laughton, Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir John Pelham Knt., aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Joan Courcy, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato John Bramshot circa 1444. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Pelhamが約1429年にイギリススセックスラウトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Pelham Knt.は43歳，母Joan Courcyは32歳であった。約1444年にJohn Bramshotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Pelham(이)가 대략 1429년 영국 수세스 로그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Pelham Knt.(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Courcy(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1444년 John Bramshot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Pelham nasceu aproximadamente 1429, em Laughton, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Pelham Knt., tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Joan Courcy, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com John Bramshot aproximadamente 1444. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Pelham родилась около 1429 г. в местности лотон, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Pelham Knt. было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Courcy, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Bramshot около 1444 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Pelham nació aproximadamente 1429, en Laughton, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Pelham Knt., tenía 43 años y su mamá, Joan Courcy, tenía 32 años. Se casó con John Bramshot aproximadamente 1444. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas.
